plays.description: Lars Nootbaar doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to left fielder Jackson Chourio.
Jordan Walker homers (21) on a fly ball to left field. JJ Wetherholt scores.
Alec Burleson flies out to left fielder Jackson Chourio.
Iván Herrera grounds out softly, second baseman Brice Turang to first baseman Jake Bauers. JJ Wetherholt to 2nd.
William Contreras grounds out, shortstop JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson.
Brice Turang strikes out on a foul tip.
Jackson Chourio flies out to center fielder Nathan Church. Christian Yelich to 3rd.
Christian Yelich hits a ground-rule double (11) on a line drive down the right-field line.
